rationale: Biology L4 decomposes each L3 research area into named molecular machines, pathways, organisms, or methods. Transcription splits by polymerase + factors + enhancers; chromatin by mark + organization; CRISPR functional screens by library type. Where L3 is itself fine-grained (e.g. RNA biology) I add 4-6 L4; where L3 is broader (e.g. genetics-genomics) I add 8-10. Plant immunity gets one L4 as the lone plant-specific entry since it's a distinct working community in the corpus.

uncovered_concerns: L3 leaves without L4 children (intentionally): plant-biology, physiology, biophysics, marine-aquatic-biology, neurobiology — papers fold under the closest mechanism L4 (signaling, organelle, etc.) at this depth, or stay at L3 only.
The 'plant-immunity-biology' leaf is the lone plant-specific L4 since plant immunity has a distinct working community.
Some L3 leaves get only 2-3 L4 because they're already at named-research-area granularity (e.g. 'foundation models for biology' is itself a working community).
